title: carex × helenae
intro: Carex × helenae, also known as Helen's sedge, is a rare, hybrid plant species that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Carex × helenae are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues. Carex × helenae can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
